since_last: 59% of 99 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.70%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.89% · Gold -0.38% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 59% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.70%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.70%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: POWL is the standout at +4.08%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +4.08%, META +3.34%, BABA +2.02%, UEC +1.48%, NOW +1.30%. Laggards: INTC -2.53%, TER -1.88%, KLAC -1.83%, LRCX -1.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.96% at $150.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
